EmailTemplate.description: Warning email indicating life limit threshold is within reach
EmailTemplate.name: Aircraft - Life Limit Threshold Warning
EmailTemplate.subject: Warning: Aircraft C-Check On {!leaseworks__Aircraft__c.Name} Threshold Approaching
EmailTemplate.textOnly: The life limit on your {!leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__c.leaseworks__Type__c} is {!leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__c.leaseworks__Life_Limit__c}. You are withing 10% of this. Please schedule a shop visit.
